thesis: The SDK ships ONE generic reconcile.Engine[K, D, O, E] — Observe once, pure total Diff, serialized idempotent Apply — and all six reconcilers become thin, state-machine-only instantiations that inherit crash-safety, totality, backoff, and testing from a single tested chassis.
oneParagraphPitch: One new Layer-1 package, internal/reconcile, encodes as a TYPE the pattern the six reconcilers currently share as prose: a keyed, level-triggered engine that (1) builds one typed Observation per entity per pass, (2) calls a pure total Diff(desired, observed) returning a Plan — ordered idempotent effects plus a closed Outcome — and (3) Applies effects through structural safety primitives: marker-last Commit, write-ahead Intent pairs, DeadWitness-gated destruction, epoch Fence, quarantine backoff. Session, convergence, dispatch, cache-sync, rig registry, and the city tick each supply only their state machine (D, O, E, Diff, Apply); the loop, recovery, and law-test harness are inherited, not transcribed. S35 is honored: domains share zero state — they share the machine. deriveConvergeActions (session_level_converge.go:214) already IS the session Diff; the engine is the missing chassis around it.
keyInsight: S35 said "copy the idioms, don't merge the domains" — but idioms copied as prose drift, which is exactly how convergence's own startup Reconciler bypassed its own commit() helper (reconcile.go:496-511). The boundary between what must stay separate (state machines) and what must be shared (mechanical crash-safety: loop, commit ordering, intent pairs, backoff, totality) is precisely a Go generic's type-parameter line. Parameterize the state machine; share the machine. A pattern encoded as a type cannot drift; a pattern encoded as a convention already has, six times.
essentialJobShape: For every entity key in every domain, forever: a key is enqueued (resync tick, event nudge, or effect completion — arrivals can ONLY enqueue); the engine builds one typed Observation {DurableFacts from beads, RuntimeFacts from one live probe, Now, entropy} — the sole impure read; a pure total Diff(desired, observed) returns an ordered idempotent Plan of absolute effects plus a closed Outcome (Done | Pending | Quarantine | Fail); effects Apply serially per key through marker-last commits, intent pairs for at-most-once side effects, and witness-gated destruction; unconverged keys requeue with jittered backoff; poison keys quarantine with TTL and an event. Fixpoint law: when durable and observed agree, Plan is empty. That is the entire job — six times, six state machines, one machine.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Domain
corePrimitives.signature: type Domain[K comparable, D, O, E any] interface { Observe(ctx context.Context, k K) (D, Observation[O], error); Diff(d D, o Observation[O]) Plan[E]; Apply(ctx context.Context, k K, e E) error }
corePrimitives.responsibility: The per-subsystem contract: one impure fact-builder, one pure total decision function, one idempotent effect executor. Everything a domain owns; nothing more.
corePrimitives.replaces: The six hand-rolled loop bodies: session Phase-1 continue-ladder, convergence Handler+Reconciler pair, dispatch ProcessControl serve loop, CachingStore reconcileLoop, supervisor ReconcileRigs, CityRuntime tick phases.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Engine
corePrimitives.signature: type Engine[K comparable, D, O, E any] struct{ dom Domain[K,D,O,E]; clk clock.Clock; q *keyedQueue[K]; guard *Quarantine[K] }; func (e *Engine[K,D,O,E]) Run(ctx context.Context) error; func (e *Engine[K,D,O,E]) Enqueue(k K); func (e *Engine[K,D,O,E]) Resync(keys []K)
corePrimitives.responsibility: Keyed workqueue with dedup, per-key jittered backoff, resync tick as level-triggered floor, per-item deadline, panic isolation with escalation, single-writer-per-key Apply serialization.
corePrimitives.replaces: CityRuntime.tick's 30-phase serial spine + 6-phase startup retry ladder (boot becomes a Resync pass — crash-only), controllerLoop shim, convergence startup Reconciler, dispatch serve loop, reloadActiveTTL band-aid, safeTick's escalation-free panic swallow.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Plan / Outcome
corePrimitives.signature: type Plan[E any] struct { Effects []E; Outcome Outcome }; type Outcome interface{ sealedOutcome() } // Done | Pending{After time.Duration} | Quarantine{Reason string, TTL time.Duration} | Fail{Err error}
corePrimitives.responsibility: The total result of a decision: ordered absolute effects plus a closed disposition. 'Retry later' and 'quarantine me' are values, never errors.
corePrimitives.replaces: ErrControlPending/ErrControlGraphMalformed sentinel dispatch via errors.Is (cmd_convoy_dispatch.go:251-260), ControlResult.Action free string (~20 literals), the session reconciler's `woken int` + side-effect-archaeology return contract.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Commit
corePrimitives.signature: func Commit(s beads.MetaWriter, id string, writes []KV, marker KV) error
corePrimitives.responsibility: Applies writes, then the dedup/progress marker, marker last by construction — the S30 helper promoted from convergence-private to engine-owned.
corePrimitives.replaces: Handler.commit (handler.go:789, generalized), reconcile.go:496-511's bare SetMetadata marker ordering, session-side patch-write ordering conventions and their 18 'byte-identical' review comments.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Intent
corePrimitives.signature: type Intent struct{ AttemptedKey, ConfirmedKey string; Backoff time.Duration }; func (i Intent) Begin(s beads.MetaWriter, id string, now time.Time) (IntentToken, error); func (i Intent) Confirm(s beads.MetaWriter, tok IntentToken) error; func (i Intent) Eligible(meta DurableFacts, now time.Time) bool
corePrimitives.responsibility: Write-ahead attempt marker + explicit confirmation + bounded retry for any at-most-once side effect — priming's two-phase vocabulary as a reusable primitive.
corePrimitives.replaces: priming_attempted_at/primed_at logic in prompt_delivery.go (generalized); extends the same crash-safe delivery to close, rollback, drift-relaunch, and spawn, which today have no intent discipline at all.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Liveness + DeadWitness
corePrimitives.signature: type Liveness int // LivenessAlive | LivenessDead | LivenessUnknown; type DeadWitness struct{ _ [0]func(); probeSeq uint64 } // constructible only inside the engine's observation builder
corePrimitives.responsibility: Tri-state runtime observation where positive confirmation of death is a capability value, not a bool.
corePrimitives.replaces: providerAlive bool and the err→false collapse (session_reconciler.go:1538-1540); the four parallel Running/Alive struct types (runtime.Liveness, session.RuntimeObservation, worker.LiveObservation ad-hoc bool projections).

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Quarantine
corePrimitives.signature: type Intensity struct{ Max int; Window time.Duration }; type Quarantine[K comparable] struct{ ... }; func (q *Quarantine[K]) Note(k K, now time.Time) Verdict // Proceed | Backoff{Until} | Quarantined{TTL}
corePrimitives.responsibility: One restart-intensity/backoff/poison-key guard, deliberately in-memory (declared OTP intensity semantics), wrapping every domain's Apply.
corePrimitives.replaces: crashTracker, supervisor panicRecord, orderDispatcher gateBackoffUntil, and the per-tracker nil-guard/rebuild-on-reload lifecycle quintuplicate (crash/idle/wisp/maxSessionAge/order).

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Fence
corePrimitives.signature: func Fence(s beads.Store, id string, expected Epoch) (Epoch, error) // CAS; returns ErrEpochConflict on stale
corePrimitives.responsibility: Epoch compare-and-swap making single-writer-per-entity a wired guard instead of a documented assumption.
corePrimitives.replaces: molecule.Attach's ExpectedEpoch→ErrEpochConflict (generalized); closes S35 gap #2 — convergence handler.go:143-145's comment-only single-writer assumption.

corePrimitives.name: sessiondomain (instantiation)
corePrimitives.signature: type sessionDomain struct{ front sessionpkg.Store; w worker.Observer; exec startExecutor }; // Observe: one worker.ObserveHandle → (SessionSpec, Observation[SessionRuntimeFacts]); Diff: deriveConvergeActions (session_level_converge.go:214, widened); Apply: existing start/drain/close/rollback executors
corePrimitives.responsibility: The session state machine as a ~300-line Domain instantiation; the S19 pure cores drop in as Diff unchanged.
corePrimitives.replaces: reconcileSessionBeadsTracedWithNamedDemand (2,188 LOC, 28 params) + its 5-overload wrapper chain (session_reconciler.go:1089-1259), the infoByID hand-fold protocol, engines B (adoption barrier create) and C (proc-table reap) — both become effects the same Diff emits.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile/simworld (test harness)
corePrimitives.signature: func Sim[K comparable, D, O, E any](t *testing.T, dom Domain[K,D,O,E], seed int64, faults FaultPlan) Report
corePrimitives.responsibility: Generic seeded VOPR: discrete-event stepper over fake store/provider/sim clock with reversible fault injection and engine-law assertions, written once, inherited by all six domains.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 5,124-LOC trace WAL as load-bearing debugger; newReconcilerTestEnv's 28-arg call reconstruction; the integration-only reachability of crash-recovery paths.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: DeadWitness
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Swallowed probe error authorizes destructive close of a live session (tmux blip → providerAlive=false → orphan-close)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Destructive effect constructors require a DeadWitness whose only minting site is the engine's observation builder on a positively-confirmed-dead probe; Unknown or errored probes cannot produce one — any bypass is a compile error.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Outcome sealed sum
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Retry-later and quarantine-me multiplexed onto the error channel, confusable with real failures
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Outcome is a closed sealed-interface set returned in the result value; sentinel errors are deleted; the exhaustive lint makes an unhandled variant a build failure, and errors.Is dispatch has nothing to dispatch on.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Commit trailing-marker
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Dedup/progress marker written before its guarded writes, creating a crash window that drops or replays work
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The API cannot express marker-first: Commit applies writes then the dedicated marker parameter internally; a vet gate bans bare SetMetadata on reconcile write paths, so the ordering is structural at every call site.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Intent token pair
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: At-most-once side effects lost forever on crash, or duplicated unboundedly (the priming trap, generalized)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Confirm() only accepts an IntentToken returned by Begin(); intent-guarded effects will not Apply without a token, so attempt-marker-before-effect and confirm-after are enforced by the type flow, not review.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Total Diff contract + closed state enums
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Unknown-state skip-forever with no TTL or escalation, re-logged every tick
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Diff's signature returns a Plan for every input and the engine has no skip path; unrecognized facts map to Quarantine{TTL} with an event; sealed enums plus the exhaustive lint make a missing switch arm un-compilable.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Single-codec Observation
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Dual raw-bead/typed-Info representation kept coherent by hand; 75 sibling predicates drifting apart
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The raw metadata map is confined to the codec package building D and O; domain Diff packages cannot import it, so a stringly predicate twin cannot be written — one representation exists past the edge.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Enqueue-only arrival API
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Edge-triggered per-arrival-path metadata stamping — each path shipping its own subset of identity/priming keys
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Spawn/adopt/resume/drift/rollback paths can only Enqueue(key); metadata writes exist solely as Diff-emitted whole-field-group effects, so 'path X forgot key Y' has no code path to live in.

errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Level-triggered engine: arrivals only enqueue; one Diff re-derives the full identity/priming set every pass and emits whole-field-group effects.
Tri-state Liveness + DeadWitness gating; Unknown observation can only defer, never close or rollback.
Total Diff with Quarantine{TTL} outcome plus escalation event; sealed enums make missing arms build failures.
Intent begin/confirm pair with bounded backoff, generalized from priming to close, rollback, relaunch, spawn.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Duplicate spawn from N launch paths
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Single per-key serialized Apply chokepoint + idempotency keys + Fence epoch CAS.
One engine-owned Commit helper inherited by all domains; bare-write vet gate on reconcile paths.
One codec edge builds typed D/O; raw map unimportable in domain packages; predicate twins and equivalence oracles deleted post-parity.
Typed Outcome sum in the Plan result; sentinel errors and errors.Is dispatch deleted.
Per-key queue with per-item deadlines; jittered per-key exponential backoff + global token bucket de-correlate retries.
Fixpoint law tested generically (Diff after Apply = empty); absolute effects only; the Diff that reads stale markers also emits their clears.

testabilityStory: Laws are written once in the engine package and inherited by all six domains: totality (fuzz random D×O — no panic, no silent skip), idempotence at fixpoint (Diff after Apply yields empty), no-destruction-on-Unknown, replay determinism (a lint gate bans time.Now/rand/store imports in Diff packages). Each domain's tests collapse to (D,O)→Plan table rows — S19's session tables already exist. simworld is a generic VOPR: a seeded discrete-event loop over fake store/provider/sim clock with reversible fault injection (crash between Commit's writes and marker, probe errors, store partials); any failure replays from seed+SHA on a laptop. Migration runs a differential oracle: legacy god function vs Engine[session] on the same seeded world, asserting identical action streams via the existing trace taxonomy, soaked to zero divergence. Serializable (D,O) snapshots turn every production incident into a permanent table row.
whatGetsDeleted: The 2,188-line/28-param mega-function + 5-overload chain; the infoByID hand-fold protocol and 18 'byte-identical' comments; 75 raw/Info predicate twins + 3 equivalence oracles (post-parity); 21 ad-hoc *Patch constructors; sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads and duplicate orphan-close engines; convergence's startup Reconciler; ErrControlPending sentinels + Action strings; the 4-heuristic lineage matcher; 5 tracker singletons; the startup retry ladder; reloadActiveTTL. The 5,124-LOC trace WAL machinery (segments/CRC/quarantine/taxonomy) dies; `gc trace` survives as a projection over {Observation, Plan, Outcome} structured records.
migrationPath: Stage 0: create internal/reconcile (Engine, Plan/Outcome, Commit, Intent, Liveness/DeadWitness, Quarantine, Fence) + laws harness + simworld; zero callers. Stage 1 (smallest, proves the chassis): port internal/convergence — collapse Handler+Reconciler into one Domain; route reconcile.go's bare marker writes through Commit; existing tests and idempotency keys are the pin. Stage 2: dispatch — ProcessControl becomes Diff over manifest state; typed Outcome behind an errors.Is-compat shim; adopt the S38 durable pointer. Stage 3 (the prize): session — deriveConvergeActions is already the Diff; build Observe (one ObserveHandle per key) and Apply over existing executors; run in shadow against the god function with the trace stream as differential oracle; flip per effect-class (strangler), one Phase-1 arm at a time, each parity-soaked; the god files shrink monotonically. Stage 4: cache-sync, rig registry, and city-tick phases become Domains or enqueue sources.
invariantFit: ZERO-roles: the engine is role-blind; D derives from config. Judgment-out-of-Go: Diff routes effects from typed desired/observed disagreement; backoff/quarantine are transport; 'stuck' is not a fact type so 'if stuck then restart' cannot be expressed. Flagged tension: a generic pure Diff makes hidden judgment easier to slip in — mitigated by the fixpoint law, a no-I/O lint on Diff packages, and the review rule that every branch must cite the disagreement it repairs. Beads-substrate: durable facts, intents, markers all live in bead metadata; Quarantine intensity stays deliberately in-memory (declared OTP semantics). Layering: internal/reconcile is Layer-1, importing only beads/clock; cmd/gc thins to a projection. Self-sufficiency: controller-only. No-premature-abstraction: six implementations exist — earned; the surface stays three methods to resist ossification.
risks: Go generics get awkward at the edges: effect capabilities (destructive, intent-guarded) need type assertions, and a too-rigid Domain contract could straitjacket dispatch's multi-step manifest resumption (mitigation: effects may carry checkpoint writes). One engine is one blast radius — an engine bug hits all six domains (defense: laws harness + per-domain parity pins). Session Observe must faithfully reproduce 28 parameters' worth of inputs — the longest, riskiest soak. Cultural risk: over-generalization, forcing non-reconciler loops into the engine.
whyThisWins: Other theses fix one domain or one idiom; this deletes the divergence generator itself. Every landed S-series artifact (S19 cores, S30 commit, S38 pointer, S35 separation) slots in as engine machinery, so past work compounds instead of competing. Six subsystems inherit crash-safety, totality, backoff, and a VOPR from one tested chassis — a convergence bug is fixed once, and the seventh reconciler costs ~300 lines of state machine.

thesis: Every reconciled entity is a crash-safe typed state machine whose bead IS its process heap, run under a supervision tree whose restart unit is the tick — so the only code that must be perfect is the fenced ledger writer, the transition table, and the supervisor.
oneParagraphPitch: Model each entity (session, molecule, scope, pool-slot) as a gen_statem-style FSM: its durable state is decoded from its bead into a sealed typed state; one Observer probes runtime once per tick into tri-state facts; a pure total Step(State, Event) -> (State', []Effect) — a compiler-checked one-method-per-state table — decides everything; a single epoch-fenced, marker-last ledger Writer commits; a budgeted Executor performs effects under write-ahead intent pairs, with destructive effects constructible only from single-use liveness witnesses. A static supervision tree (observer -> keyed shards -> executor) owns the goroutines with restart intensity and per-entity quarantine; because the bead is the heap, "let it crash" means abandon the tick and re-derive — startup, crash recovery, and steady state are one code path. The 14.4K-LOC god files become thin projections over ~6 small kernel packages.
keyInsight: When state is durable, OTP restart strategies collapse into exactly two things — tick abandonment (one_for_all becomes "abandon this tick, re-observe") and per-entity restart intensity (quarantine) — which makes "let it crash" free: the tick loop already IS the restart mechanism. Therefore the error kernel legitimately shrinks to three components (ledger writer, transition table, supervisor), and everything else — probing, template resolution, tmux I/O — is a disposable leaf allowed to fail arbitrarily.
essentialJobShape: Per entity, per tick: decode the bead into a typed State (unknown strings decode to a first-class Unrecognized state); observe runtime once into tri-state Facts (Alive|Absent|Unknown); run pure total Step(State, Event{Facts}) -> (State', []Effect); commit State' through the one fenced marker-last Writer; execute Effects under write-ahead intent markers within a per-tick budget. A crash anywhere discards only scratch — the next tick re-derives from the bead, so boot, recovery, and steady state are the same operation. Supervision adds only: retry ordering (observe before step before execute), restart intensity (N failures/window -> quarantine the entity, escalate via event+bead), and tick abandonment when observation itself fails. Nothing else is essential.

corePrimitives.name: fsm sealed-state machine (per entity type)
corePrimitives.signature: type SessionStep interface { OnAbsent(Facts) Next; OnCreating(Facts) Next; OnActive(Facts) Next; OnDraining(Facts) Next; OnQuarantined(Facts) Next; OnUnrecognized(Unrecognized, Facts) Next }; type Next struct { State SessionState; Effects []Effect }
corePrimitives.responsibility: The pure, total, compiler-checked transition table: State x ObservedEvent -> (State', []Effect). Time and entropy enter as Facts fields.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 2,188-line Phase-1 continue-ladder (session_reconciler.go:1435-3038); absorbs deriveConvergeActions/ProjectLifecycle; the 21 *Patch constructors (lifecycle_transition.go); the decorative Transition table (state_machine.go); knownSessionStates allowlist

corePrimitives.name: ledger.Writer (error-kernel #1)
corePrimitives.signature: func (w *Writer) Apply(ctx context.Context, id beads.ID, c Commit) error; type Commit struct { Writes []Set; PreMarker []Set; Marker Set; Fence Epoch }
corePrimitives.responsibility: The ONLY bead-mutation path: absolute-assignment writes, marker structurally last, epoch CAS rejects stale writers with ErrFenced.
corePrimitives.replaces: Generalizes convergence handler.commit (handler.go:789) + molecule epoch fence (internal/molecule ErrEpochConflict); replaces reconcile.go:496-511 bare SetMetadata ordering and ~252 raw Metadata write sites

corePrimitives.name: observe.Observer
corePrimitives.signature: func (o *Observer) Entity(ctx context.Context, k EntityKey) (World, error); type World struct { Durable DurableFacts; Runtime RuntimeFacts }; RuntimeFacts.Live is Alive|Absent|Unknown
corePrimitives.responsibility: One probe per entity per tick; probe errors become Unknown, never false; also mints single-use liveness witnesses.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 4 runtime-fact types (runtime.Liveness, session.RuntimeObservation, worker.LiveObservation, session.RuntimeFacts); the narrow workerSessionTarget* re-probing accessors; the hand-folded infoByID snapshot protocol; LifecycleInput dual feeds

corePrimitives.name: exec.Executor with intent pairs
corePrimitives.signature: func (x *Executor) Run(ctx context.Context, owned Owned, effs []Effect) Report; at-most-once effects run via OpenIntent(attemptedKey) -> act -> Confirm(confirmedKey)
corePrimitives.responsibility: The only side-effecting code besides Observe; every one-shot effect is write-ahead attempted then confirmed, crash-safe by construction.
corePrimitives.replaces: Triplicated attach pipelines; executePlannedStartsTraced scattering; per-arrival-path identity/priming stamping; generalizes prompt_delivery.go's primed_at/priming_attempted_at to start/nudge/close/teardown

corePrimitives.name: supervise.Tree (error-kernel #2)
corePrimitives.signature: type ChildSpec struct { Name string; Run func(ctx) error; Restart Strategy; Intensity Budget }; func (t *Tree) Run(ctx context.Context) error
corePrimitives.responsibility: Static declared goroutine tree (observer, shards, executor, scheduler, janitor) with per-child restart+backoff and an escalation ladder; startup is just the first tick.
corePrimitives.replaces: The unstructured go func() zoo (controller.go, city_runtime.go, api_state.go); safeTick's blanket recover; supervisor panicRecord duplication; the 6-phase startup retry ladder (city_runtime.go:445-648); the reloadActiveTTL band-aid

corePrimitives.name: quarantine.Guard
corePrimitives.signature: func (g *Guard) Admit(k EntityKey, now time.Time) Decision // Admit | Backoff{Until} | Quarantine{EscalationBead}
corePrimitives.responsibility: Per-entity restart intensity with jittered backoff; quarantine escalates via event + durable bead for a prompt/human to decide treatment — Go never decides it.
corePrimitives.replaces: crashTracker, the global sessionCircuitBreakerSingleton, the unknown-state skip-forever branch (session_reconciler.go:1523-1532), and the de-correlation logic for #3279 respawn storms

corePrimitives.name: shard.Keyed stepper
corePrimitives.signature: func (s *Shards) Tick(ctx context.Context, keys []EntityKey, b Budget); Budget{MaxSteps, MaxStarts, Deadline}; step receives Owned[EntityKey]
corePrimitives.responsibility: Per-key serial execution (single writer per entity in-process), per-phase context deadlines, fairness aging; unserved entities simply wait for the next tick.
corePrimitives.replaces: The batch mega-function loop + its 5-overload wrapper chain (session_reconciler.go:1089-1259); the unbounded ~30-phase serial tick() (city_runtime.go:929-1300); inline wake-fairness/budget code

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Sealed per-state handler interface
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Unknown/unhandled state skip-forever (#2085, #2389)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: One interface method per state; adding a state without a handler fails compilation everywhere. Unparseable ledger strings decode to a typed Unrecognized{Raw, Since} state whose handler (TTL -> quarantine) is compiler-forced.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Witness-gated destructive effects
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Swallowed probe error authorizes close of a live session (#2987, gc-hz0nu, gc-kkgak)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: CloseBead/StopRuntime have unexported fields; constructors require an AbsenceWitness that only Observer mints on a successful probe returning Absent, single-use and tick-stamped. Unknown mints nothing — the effect value cannot be constructed.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Fenced marker-last Commit
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Marker-written-early crash windows and cross-process double-writer clobber
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Marker is a distinct trailing struct field the Writer always writes last (S30 pattern, now the only path); Epoch CAS returns ErrFenced to stale writers, so a disagreeing second writer is rejected, never merged.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Owned[EntityKey] token
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Two in-process writers concurrently stamping one bead (#1029 class)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Step and Executor APIs require an Owned value only the shard dispatcher mints, one per key at a time; a second in-process write path for the same entity cannot type-check.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Intent pair as a Commit mode
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: At-most-once vs unbounded at-least-once delivery (lost startup prompt, #3279 re-nudge storms)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: One-shot effects only execute through OpenIntent -> act -> Confirm; recovery reads attempted-without-confirmed and retries with bounded backoff. There is no API to fire the effect without opening the intent.

errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: No arrival paths exist: every tick re-runs Step over full typed state; identity/priming are effects emitted whenever facts show them missing (level-triggered).
Unrecognized is a real typed state with TTL and quarantine escalation; the compiler forces its handler.
Tri-state liveness plus witness-gated effect constructors; Unknown cannot mint a witness.
Intent WAL pair (attempted -> confirmed) mandatory for every at-most-once effect, generalizing S19 priming.
Owned token (in-process) + epoch fence (cross-process) + single decode at the edge; Info mirrors and 75 predicate twins deleted.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Duplicate spawn from N launch paths
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Exactly one Step per entity emits StartRuntime, intent-keyed and per-key serial; pool demand computed from the same observed World.
Transitions happen only via the table over full typed state; each transition's Commit clears its marker keys atomically, so leftovers cannot re-fire.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Head-of-line tick wedge and synchronized respawn storms
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Sharded budgeted stepping with per-phase deadlines; quarantine backoff is jittered per entity; wedged shard restarts under supervision without killing the city.

testabilityStory: The kernel is pure and closed, so testing is enumeration, not sampling. (1) Per-machine table tests over the State x Event cross-product; totality is compiler-enforced, so the tables test outcomes, not reachability. (2) Two laws as property tests: fixpoint idempotence (Step after effects land emits nothing — extends TestDeriveConvergeActionsIdempotent) and no-destructive-on-Unknown (vacuously true by witness types; fuzzed anyway as a tripwire). (3) A simworld DST tier below the subprocess chaos tier: memstore + runtime.NewFake + clock.Fake + seeded fault decorator on Writer/Observer seams, millions of histories, invariant "all started work completes," seed+SHA laptop replay. (4) Crash-only recovery: kill at any point, assert next-tick convergence — there is no separate recovery path to test. (5) Differential oracle during migration: new machines' effect streams diffed against the legacy trace-decision stream. (6) Supervisor/quarantine unit-tested on injected clocks.
whatGetsDeleted: The 5-overload chain + 2,188-line god function; most of session_reconciler.go (5,101), build_desired_state.go (4,575), session_lifecycle_parallel.go (3,241) shrink to projections. 75 *Info predicates + 3 equivalence oracles + 72-arm ApplyPatch; 21 *Patch constructors; 4 runtime-fact types -> 1; 5 tracker singletons; startup ladder + bootReconcile; sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads. The trace WAL store (5,124 LOC segments/CRC/quarantine/arms) dies; `gc trace` survives as a reader over a plain structured {state, event, effects, commit} decision log that is deterministically replayable.
migrationPath: A) Extract internal/ledger from convergence handler.commit:789 + molecule epoch fence; route convergence's Reconciler through it (closes the residual marker-ordering gap). B) Define the Session machine's sealed states/events; run it as a pure shadow per tick over the landed S19 durableFacts/runtimeFacts, diffing its effect stream against legacy trace decisions to zero divergence (the parity pin, generalized). C) Flip effect families one at a time — identity-stamp, priming, heal, drain, witness-gated close last — deleting each legacy branch and its Info mirrors per flip. D) Shard: per-key stepping under budgets replaces the batch loop; the 30s tick becomes resync; a batch shim keeps cross-session concerns (min-floor, wake fairness) until ported as shard policies. E) Formalize the supervision tree; trackers fold into quarantine.Guard; startup becomes the first tick. F) Port dispatch/convergence onto the shared mechanical primitives; state machines stay per-domain (S35). This supersedes S19 stages 3-7 on the same seams.
invariantFit: ZERO-roles: states/events/effects are lifecycle-mechanical; no role names — pass. Judgment-out-of-Go: table rows are convergence bookkeeping (durable intent vs observed runtime); quarantine stops the bleeding but escalates treatment to prompts via event+bead. TENSION: tables can smuggle policy ("drain after N idle ticks") — thresholds must come from Config and a review rule ("every row derivable from the definition of convergence") is needed; Go cannot check this. Beads-substrate: durable state is the bead; only loss-tolerant scratch (fairness ages, intensity counters — deliberate OTP semantics) is in-memory; quarantine verdicts persist as beads. TENSION: a crash-looper regains budget on restart — accepted, documented, matching OTP. Layering: kernel in internal/, side effects confined to Executor/Observer (Layer 0); cmd/gc becomes projection — pass. Self-sufficiency: runs with zero agents — pass. Abstraction is earned: six reconcilers exist.
risks: Go's totality is via interface methods — contributors can bypass with type switches (needs a lint). Witnesses could be stored and replayed stale — must be single-use and tick-stamped, enforced by convention plus vet rule. Parity-pinning per-entity machines against a batch function is genuinely hard where legacy has cross-session coupling (min-floor scans, fairness) — the batch shim stage could linger. Migration is long; stalling mid-way leaves two systems (mitigated by deleting legacy per flip). Supervision tree risks becoming ceremony if applied below ~5 goroutines.
whyThisWins: T2 is the only shape that shrinks the must-be-perfect surface to three nameable components and makes the two worst classes (unhandled state, close-on-guess) compile-time impossible rather than tested-against. Per-entity machines dissolve the god function by construction, not refactoring discipline. And it is the destination S19 was already walking toward — the migration reuses landed, verified seams (deriveConvergeActions, commit(), epoch fence) instead of inventing new ones.

thesis: The reconciler is one pure, total Decide(Snapshot) -> Plan; the shell only Observes and Applies; correctness is proven — not argued — by deterministic whole-fleet simulation, with every failure replayable from seed+SHA.
oneParagraphPitch: Every tick the shell builds one immutable Snapshot — typed durable facts per session bead, a tri-state runtime observation taken exactly once, config-derived desired world, tick time and entropy as fields — and feeds it to Decide, a pure total function in a lint-gated package returning an ordered Plan of closed-sum Effects. A single interpreter Applies the plan under write-ahead fences and marker-last commits; destructive effects are unconstructible without an AbsenceWitness minted from a positive observation. Because the whole decision surface is a serializable value in and a serializable value out, the entire fleet runs in a seeded simulator — fake store, fake provider, simulated clock, crashes injected between any two effects — asserting safety invariants every step and liveness after quiescence. The 2,188-line god function becomes a table; the 5-KLOC trace WAL becomes a {Snapshot, Plan} flight-recorder log.
keyInsight: The trace WAL's 60-field record with ~185 Site/Reason/Outcome codes is empirical proof that the reconciler's decision inputs are finitely enumerable — the codebase already built the Snapshot type, but pointed it BACKWARDS, recording inputs for forensics after each decision. Point it forwards (inputs frozen before the decision) and purity, determinism, replay, and simulation are not aspirations; they fall out. The single-writer tick makes Gas City one of the rare systems where whole-world snapshotting is actually sound — no other writer can invalidate the snapshot mid-decision.
essentialJobShape: Per tick: OBSERVE — project each session bead once into typed DurableFacts (one field per metadata key, no precedence ladders), probe the runtime once into tri-state RuntimeFacts (Alive/Absent/Unknown{err}), capture the desired world from config, stamp now+entropy; freeze everything as one Snapshot. DECIDE — for every session key, a pure total function picks ordered effects from a closed vocabulary: start, attempt-prime, confirm-prime, stamp-identity, heal-state, drain, adopt, close(witness), rollback(witness), reap(witness), quarantine(TTL), defer. APPLY — one interpreter executes steps in order under fences and marker-last commits; a step failure aborts that key only, and the next tick re-derives. Fixpoint law: when durable, runtime, and desired agree, Decide returns the empty plan. Everything else is observation quality or effect transport.

corePrimitives.name: Snapshot + ObserveSnapshot
corePrimitives.signature: func ObserveSnapshot(ctx context.Context, d ObserveDeps) (reconcile.Snapshot, error); type Snapshot struct { Tick TickFacts /*Now, Seq, Entropy*/; Desired DesiredWorld; Cells []Cell /*sorted*/; Health ObsHealth }; type Cell struct { Key SessionKey; Durable *DurableFacts; Runtime RuntimeFacts }
corePrimitives.responsibility: Build the one immutable, serializable world value per tick; observation errors become typed facts, never booleans; time and entropy enter as fields.
corePrimitives.replaces: infoByID hand-coherence protocol, the 4 runtime-fact struct types, the 5 observation mechanisms and per-question narrow accessors (workerSessionTargetRunning/Alive/Attached), the 28-param positional threading and 5-overload wrapper chain.

corePrimitives.name: Decide
corePrimitives.signature:
package internal/reconcile // lint-gated: no time.Now, no math/rand, no io, no goroutines
func Decide(s Snapshot) Plan
corePrimitives.responsibility: The ENTIRE decision surface: pure, total over every Cell, empty at fixpoint. Grows the landed S19 deriveConvergeActions to every Phase-1 arm.
corePrimitives.replaces: reconcileSessionBeadsTracedWithNamedDemand (session_reconciler.go:1231, 2,188 LOC), the ~14 ad-hoc durable-vs-runtime comparison sites across 3 engines, the wake/sleep decision loop, per-arrival-path stamping branches.

corePrimitives.name: Effect closed sum + Plan
corePrimitives.signature:
type Effect interface{ isEffect() } // variants: StartSession{Prep}, AttemptPrime{Fence}, ConfirmPrime, StampIdentity, HealState, BeginDrain, Adopt, CloseBead{W AbsenceWitness}, RollbackRuntime{W}, Reap{W}, Quarantine{TTL}, Defer{Until}
type Plan struct{ Steps []Step }; type Step struct{ Key SessionKey; Effect Effect; Reason Reason }
corePrimitives.responsibility: Closed, ordered, absolute (never relative) mutation vocabulary; the only language for changing the world; exhaustiveness-linted.
corePrimitives.replaces: The >=4 closeSessionBeadIf* variants, sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads, separate adoption (Engine B) and proc-reap (Engine C) mutations, and the ~185-code SiteCode/ReasonCode/OutcomeCode trace taxonomy.

corePrimitives.name: Applier
corePrimitives.signature:
type Applier struct { Store beads.Store; Worker worker.Handle; Rec events.Recorder; Clk clock.Clock }
func (a *Applier) Apply(ctx context.Context, p reconcile.Plan) ApplyReport
corePrimitives.responsibility: The ONLY side-effecting component. Executes steps in plan order via Commit + fences; per-key failure isolation; fires events; nothing else mutates session beads.
corePrimitives.replaces: executePlannedStartsTraced write paths, the 21 *Patch constructors as primary write path, advanceSessionDrains mutations, stopRuntimeBeforeSessionBeadMutation, scattered SetMetadata call sites.

corePrimitives.name: Liveness + AbsenceWitness
corePrimitives.signature:
type Liveness struct{ K LivenessKind /*Alive|Absent|Unknown*/; Err error }
type AbsenceWitness struct{ key SessionKey; tick uint64; _ noCopy } // unexported ctor; minted only by ObserveSnapshot on K==Absent; valid one tick
corePrimitives.responsibility: Make 'unknown' a value and death a proof: every destructive effect field demands the witness, so probes that errored cannot authorize destruction.
corePrimitives.replaces: providerAlive bool error-swallow (session_reconciler.go:1540), storeQueryPartial and deferSessionClosesOnBoot boolean guards, the reactive fail-closed liveness gates of S16.

corePrimitives.name: Fence (write-ahead intent pair)
corePrimitives.responsibility: Generalizes primed_at/priming_attempted_at into the universal exactly-once-across-crash wrapper for every effectful op: prime, spawn, close, relaunch, teardown.
corePrimitives.replaces: Per-path priming/identity stamping, bespoke pendingCreate lease logic, the at-most-once vs unbounded-at-least-once delivery dilemma solved once instead of per-site.

corePrimitives.name: Commit (marker-ordered write)
corePrimitives.signature: func Commit(s beads.Store, id beads.ID, writes []MetaWrite, preMarker, marker MetaWrite) error
corePrimitives.responsibility: Marker-written-LAST as a call-shape guarantee; the shared mechanical helper (with convergence/dispatch) — shared plumbing, not merged domains.
corePrimitives.replaces: Hand-ordered SetMetadata sequences on reconciler and convergence-startup paths; the 18 'byte-identical' review-proven ordering comments.

corePrimitives.name: simworld
corePrimitives.responsibility: Deterministic whole-fleet simulation at compressed time; extends the chaos-harness design one tier below the subprocess harness; prints seed+SHA on failure.
corePrimitives.replaces: The load-bearing role of the WAL trace subsystem; most integration-only crash-recovery coverage (the //go:build integration boot for tracker paths).

corePrimitives.name: Invariant engine
corePrimitives.signature:
type Invariant struct{ Name string; When Phase /*EveryStep|AfterQuiescence*/; Check func(h *History) error }
var Suite = []Invariant{ NoLiveSessionBeadClosed, NoDestructiveOnUnknown, MarkerLast, AtMostOneDuplicatePrimePerCrash, ConvergesWithinKTicks, AllStartedWorkTerminal, DecideFixpointEmpty }
corePrimitives.responsibility: The executable spec: safety asserted every simulation step, liveness only after fault quiescence; every past incident becomes a permanent invariant or seed.
corePrimitives.replaces: Side-effect archaeology tests (assert woken int, then store.GetMetadata) across the ~56K LOC test surface.

corePrimitives.name: Flight recorder
corePrimitives.signature: func RecordTick(w io.Writer, s reconcile.Snapshot, p reconcile.Plan) error // size-capped JSONL
corePrimitives.responsibility: Production observability AND replay corpus: any incident tick re-runs Decide offline, deterministically; gc trace becomes a projection over this log.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 5,124-LOC bespoke WAL store: 16MB segments, CRC32 batches, corrupt-segment quarantine, head-file recovery, pruning, per-template arms.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: AbsenceWitness
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Swallowed probe error authorizes destructive close of a live session (tmux blip -> providerAlive=false -> orphan-close)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: CloseBead/RollbackRuntime/Reap effects have a required AbsenceWitness field whose constructor is unexported and only invoked by ObserveSnapshot when Liveness==Absent. An errored probe yields Unknown — no witness exists to place in the struct; the destructive effect literally cannot be built.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Fence
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: At-most-once prompt loss / unbounded at-least-once redelivery across crashes (the S19 priming trap, generalized to spawn/close/relaunch)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The Applier's only effectful entry points take a Fence; attempt-marker is stamped before I/O by the interpreter itself, confirm after. A crash in the window leaves attempted-unconfirmed, which Eligible() converts to bounded retry — no call site can reorder the pair.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Closed Effect + State sums with exhaustiveness lint
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Unknown-state skip-forever (typo or version-skew state parks a session indefinitely, re-logged every tick)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: State and Effect are closed enums; every switch in Decide is exhaustive-linted with no default-skip arm — an unmatched state is a build failure. The unknown-observation case maps to a typed Quarantine{TTL} effect that escalates via event, so 'silently stuck' has no representation.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Determinism gate on internal/reconcile
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Hidden nondeterminism (time.Now, math/rand, map-iteration order, goroutines, store reads) leaking into decisions and silently breaking replay
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: A vet-style CI test forbids the pure package from importing os/io/net/math-rand and from calling time.Now (time only as struct fields); Cells is a sorted slice, not a map. Nondeterminism cannot compile into the core.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Observe-once Snapshot as Decide's only parameter
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: TOCTOU disagreement between multiple per-question probes of the same session in one tick (heal#1 vs heal#2 seeing different liveness)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Decide's signature admits no store, provider, or context — there is no API through which a decision can re-probe. All arms of all decisions read the same frozen RuntimeFacts by construction.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Crash-point Injector
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Untested crash windows between decide and act, and between adjacent effects (phantom restarts, half-stamped identity)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Not a type — a structural coverage guarantee: the simulator's interpreter loop consults the injector before every effect, so 'crash between effect i and i+1' is an enumerated, seeded test point for every plan the system can emit, forever.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Edge-triggered per-arrival-path metadata stamping (bugs live in the gaps between paths)
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: There are no arrival paths in Decide — identity, priming, firstStart are re-derived every tick from facts; a missing stamp is healed next tick by construction.
Tri-state Liveness plus AbsenceWitness: Unknown can never mint the proof a destructive effect requires.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Unknown-state skip-forever with no TTL or escalation
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Closed state sum + exhaustive lint + typed Quarantine{TTL} effect that fires an event and escalates.

errorClassesEliminated.class: At-most-once / at-least-once side-effect delivery across crashes
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Fence attempt/confirm pair enforced inside the single interpreter; bounded-retry eligibility is a pure function of durable facts.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Dual representation (raw Bead vs Info) kept coherent by hand; 75 sibling predicates
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: One projection at the codec edge into DurableFacts; the second representation and its equivalence oracles cease to exist.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Duplicate spawn / ghost pool demand from N drifting launch paths
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: One Decide computes demand jointly over durable+observed facts; StartSession effects carry fence idempotency keys, so replays dedupe.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Phantom lifecycle transitions from stale markers (reset re-fires restart; fresh session drained pre-window)
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Total derivation from the full fact set plus the fixpoint-idempotence property test: Decide after Apply must be empty, so stale-marker re-fires surface as law violations in simulation.
Backoff schedule is a pure function of (failure-count fact, Snapshot entropy) — jitter is deterministic, testable for spread, and de-correlates the herd.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Crash-between-writes corruption on the marker path
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Commit(writes, preMarker, marker) makes marker-last a call shape; simworld crashes between every write pair prove recovery is the normal pass.

testabilityStory: Five layers, each cheaper and more exhaustive than the last. (1) Table tests: every (DurableFacts x RuntimeFacts x Desired) row is a plain Go struct in, []Effect out — no mocks, no clock, no tmux; the S19 tables already exist and widen. (2) Law tests: totality (fuzz random facts, never panic, never default-skip), fixpoint idempotence (Decide after Apply+re-Observe == empty), no-destructive-on-Unknown, effect absoluteness (shuffle+duplicate a plan, same converged world). (3) simworld DST: seeded scenarios over memstore+fake provider+sim clock at 1000x compression, crashes injected between every adjacent effect pair, store/provider faults; safety checked every step, liveness after quiescence; failures print seed+SHA and replay on a laptop; rapid shrinks histories and bridges to go-fuzz; quick seeds per PR, continuous soak nightly. (4) Differential oracle: legacy god function vs Decide on identical simulated worlds during migration. (5) Production flight-recorder ticks replay offline — every incident becomes a permanent regression row.
whatGetsDeleted: The 2,188-line god function + 5 overload shims (session_reconciler.go shrinks to Observe/Apply glue); the ~14 ad-hoc durable-vs-runtime sites including sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads and the separate adoption/proc-reap engines; 75 *Info sibling predicates, 3 equivalence-oracle suites, the 72-arm ApplyPatch, knownSessionStates allowlist. The trace WAL does NOT survive: all 5,124 LOC of segments/CRC/quarantine/arms/head-recovery are replaced by a ~300-LOC {Snapshot,Plan} JSONL flight recorder; `gc trace` survives as a projection over it. Net roughly 15K LOC deleted, ~4K added (pure core + simworld).
migrationPath: Stage 0 (before touching behavior): build simworld + the determinism lint; inject clock into CityRuntime (the chaos-harness plan's flagged gap). Stage 1: land ObserveSnapshot; prove Snapshot-derived facts equal the legacy raw/Info predicates using the existing equivalence oracles as the parity pin. Stage 2: put the LEGACY god function under the simulator via a plan-extraction shim — its trace-decision stream is its plan — establishing the differential oracle before any change. Stage 3: grow the landed deriveConvergeActions into Decide arm-by-arm (rollback, identity, priming, heal, drain, close, wake/pool), each arm shadow-diffed against the legacy trace stream to zero divergence in sim AND production shadow mode, then flipped per-arm behind the pin (S19 Stages 2-3 reused verbatim). Stage 4: Applier absorbs the write paths behind Commit+Fence. Stage 5: delete legacy arms, mirrors, oracles, WAL. Every stage ships green; nothing flips unpinned.
invariantFit: ZERO-roles: Decide reads config-supplied specs; no role names anywhere. Judgment-out-of-Go: Decide routes effects mechanically ('durable absent + runtime live = rollback' is bookkeeping); its total, table-tested branches are the most auditable enforcement point — reviewers can prove no branch encodes model-substitutable reasoning; quarantine/backoff are OTP-style intensity, not judgment. Beads: durable facts, fences, quarantine markers are bead metadata; Apply fires events; side effects confined to the Layer-0 Applier; cmd/gc becomes a projection. Self-sufficiency: controller-only. No-premature-abstraction: upheld — no generic Reconciler[S,E]; session/convergence/dispatch keep separate state machines (S35), sharing only mechanical helpers (Commit, Fence) that already have two implementations. Flagged tension: the flight recorder is a file — acceptable as telemetry/replay corpus, never process-state; the process table stays truth.
risks: Snapshot can ossify into a new 87-field god struct (needs per-concern sub-structs and a field budget). The observe-to-apply staleness window is real: witnesses expire after one tick and kills are targeted+idempotent, but a genuinely external actor racing the tick remains possible — converged next tick, not prevented. Fake-provider fidelity can drift from tmux (requires a conformance suite run against both). DST pays off only with continuous soak CPU. Shadow-parity diffing against a nondeterministic legacy path can stall on noise, stretching an already long migration.
whyThisWins: Other theses reorganize code; this one changes the proof system. A pure Decide turns the 100+-bug corpus into table rows and every future incident into a replayable seed. It subsumes S19 (same shape, finished), reuses the landed cores and fakes, deletes the 5-KLOC trace crutch instead of maintaining it, and is the only design where crash-safety between effects is an enumerated, tested property rather than a review claim.

corePrimitives.name: SessionSpec / SessionStatus field groups + single-owner whole-value appliers (SSA-lite)
corePrimitives.responsibility: One whole-value writer per field group. Store front door rejects raw SetMetadata on owned prefixes; an import-boundary test pins the call sites.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 21 ad-hoc *Patch constructors (internal/session/lifecycle_transition.go), per-arrival-path stamping in cmd/gc/session_reconciler.go / adoption_barrier.go / session_lifecycle_parallel.go, ApplyPatch's 72-arm fold + MarkClosed (info_apply_patch.go), and Info's ~50 raw-string mirror fields.

corePrimitives.name: Observation — one typed snapshot, one bounded probe, per key per pass
corePrimitives.responsibility: Collapse the four runtime-fact types and five probe mechanisms into one tri-state snapshot built exactly once; time enters as a field, never a call.
corePrimitives.replaces: runtime.Liveness, session.RuntimeObservation, worker.LiveObservation, session.RuntimeFacts (4 structs); the narrow re-probing accessors (workerSessionTargetRunning/Alive/Attached…); the hand-maintained infoByID snapshot-coherence protocol and its 18 'byte-identical' comments.

corePrimitives.name: Plan — the pure, total, exhaustive diff core
corePrimitives.responsibility: The whole decision surface: adopt, start, prime, heal, drain, teardown, close, quarantine — derived level-triggered from one Observation. Both reconciliation directions are rows of the same diff.
corePrimitives.replaces: The 2,188-line Phase-1 continue-ladder + wake/sleep loop of reconcileSessionBeadsTracedWithNamedDemand (session_reconciler.go:1231-3431), the adoption barrier's decision logic (Engine B), the proc-table reap decisions (Engine C), and sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads (city_runtime.go:2685). Grows the already-merged, currently-unwired S19 deriveConvergeActions (cmd/gc/session_level_converge.go).

corePrimitives.name: Executor — the only side-effecting site (Materialize)
corePrimitives.signature:
type Executor struct { store *session.Store; provider runtime.Provider; events events.Bus; clock clock.Clock }
func (e *Executor) Execute(ctx context.Context, obs Observation, acts Actions) Outcome  // in order; each action idempotent; first error stops the pass → AddRateLimited(key)
corePrimitives.responsibility: Thin, conditional-free interpreter of Actions under per-key exclusivity; all writes go through the two appliers; all Layer-0 I/O lives here.
corePrimitives.replaces: The triplicated attach pipelines, the 3 scope-close copies, the closeSessionBeadIf* helper family, stopRuntimeBeforeSessionBeadMutation, and every inline mutation site in the god function.

corePrimitives.name: reconcile.Queue — keyed, rate-limited, per-key-exclusive requeue with resync floor
corePrimitives.responsibility: Replaces the serial mega-tick with per-key scheduling: dropped edges heal at resync, failures back off individually, herds are de-correlated, one slow probe delays only its key.
corePrimitives.replaces: The fixed 30s serial tick()'s ~30-phase spine (city_runtime.go:929-1300), tickDebouncer/pokeDB edge overlay, the reloadActiveTTL wedged-tick band-aid (city_runtime.go:1596), and the backoff maps inside crashTracker/idleTracker/orderDispatcher.

corePrimitives.name: Finalizer protocol — guaranteed teardown, proof-gated close
corePrimitives.responsibility: A session bead structurally cannot reach closed while its runtime may live; teardown is a retried, level-triggered reconcile step, not a path-local edge effect.
corePrimitives.replaces: The orphan/!desired close arm (session_reconciler.go:1908), the pending-create rollback teardown paths, and the scattered pane-leak guards; inverts the default from close-on-guess to prove-dead-before-close.

corePrimitives.name: IntentMarker — the two-phase (attempted → confirmed) effect primitive
corePrimitives.responsibility: Generalizes S19's priming_attempted_at/primed_at pair into the standard shape for every at-most-once side effect: prime, nudge, spawn, reset.
corePrimitives.replaces: Ad-hoc primed_at handling in prompt_delivery.go's call sites, and the stale reset/drain-ack marker choreography behind the #2574 phantom-restart class.

corePrimitives.name: internal/reconcile — shared MECHANICS kit (the S35 refinement)
corePrimitives.responsibility: Domain-agnostic crash-safety helpers shared by session, convergence, and dispatch — closing convergence's reconcile.go bare-SetMetadata marker gap and dispatch's drifting copies.
corePrimitives.replaces: Per-subsystem re-implementations: convergence reconcile.go:496-511 hand-rolled marker ordering, dispatch's private epoch fence, and the idempotency-key duplication across engines. Verdict on S35 stress-test: the session reconciler does NOT become a second instance of convergence's engine (its dual Handler+Reconciler split is itself a defect); both domains instead instantiate the one Observe→Plan→Materialize shape over their own typed states, sharing only this kit.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: DeathCertificate
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Swallowed probe error authorizes destructive close of a live session (gc-hz0nu, gc-kkgak, #2987)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Unexported fields; sole constructor RuntimeFacts.CertifyDead() succeeds only when Probe==Observed && Live==Dead. ActionClose and ActionRemoveFinalizer require the field, so a close derived from Unknown/errored liveness cannot compile.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: LiveTargetWitness
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Kill/teardown aimed at an unprobed or misidentified pane (reap-wrong-session)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: ActionTeardown embeds a witness constructible only from this pass's Probe==Observed ∧ IdentityMatch==True; stale-identity or blind kills are unbuildable values.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Whole-value single-owner appliers (SSA-lite)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: N arrival paths stamp divergent metadata subsets (#3872 class — identity/priming gap bugs)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: No per-key write API exists: ApplySpec/ApplyStatus take the full struct and are each the sole writer of their prefix; the store front door rejects raw SetMetadata on gc.spec./gc.status.; a boundary test pins call sites.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Finalizer-gated Close (CloseProof)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Bead closed while its runtime pane lives — the rollback pane-leak (#2073) and its orphan-close dual
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: The store exposes no unconditional close. CloseProof is mintable only from a status with an empty finalizer set, and the teardown finalizer is removable only with a DeathCertificate.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: StateUnrecognized + exhaustive Plan
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Unknown-state skip-forever with no TTL or escalation (#2085, #2389)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Decoding is total: unknown strings become typed StateUnrecognized{raw, firstSeen}; the exhaustive lint forces a Plan arm, which emits Quarantine{TTL}+event. There is no default-continue left to write.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Rev-CAS ApplyStatus
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Stale in-memory snapshot folded back over fresher durable state (ga-ebb62d, #1029 hand-coherence)
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: There is no snapshot-patch API to misuse; every status write carries the Rev observed this pass; a mismatch fails to a requeue, so clobbering a newer write is structurally impossible.

newErrorKillingPrimitives.name: Per-key-exclusive jittered queue + start token bucket
newErrorKillingPrimitives.errorClassKilled: Synchronized respawn herd (#3279) and mega-tick head-of-line stalls
newErrorKillingPrimitives.howUnrepresentable: Keys dedup; a key is never in two workers; retry times are independent per-key jittered exponential draws under a global start budget — a coordinated retry herd cannot be expressed in the scheduler.

errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Every arrival path (spawn/adopt/resume/drift/rollback) calls the one DeriveSpec + whole-value ApplySpec; resync re-derivation heals any historical gap next pass.
Destructive actions require proof types (DeathCertificate, LiveTargetWitness); Unknown liveness or an unprobed runtime cannot mint them.
Finalizer blocks bead closure until teardown is confirmed dead; retried level-triggered every pass, surviving crashes mid-teardown.
Closed LifecycleState enum with typed Unrecognized variant; exhaustive switch emits quarantine with TTL and an event instead of continue.
Per-key jittered exponential backoff, Forget-on-converge, global start token bucket replacing lockstep 30s retries.
One typed Observation per pass; CAS whole-value applies; the ApplyPatch fold, raw/Info predicate twins, and equivalence oracles are deleted.

errorClassesEliminated.class: Duplicate spawn from N drifting launch paths
errorClassesEliminated.mechanism: Only ActionStart starts sessions, minted by the one Plan, deduped by a spawn IntentMarker plus per-key queue exclusivity.
Markers are typed IntentMarker pairs owned solely by ApplyStatus; whole-value applies clear unmentioned keys, so stale reset/drain leftovers cannot linger.
IntentMarker write-ahead attempted + confirmed pair with bounded backoff — S19's fix, generalized to every effect.

essentialJobShape: Per session key: read spec (desired facts, one owner), read status (observed facts, one owner), probe the runtime exactly once into tri-state facts, and run a pure total Plan(Observation) emitting a short ordered action list — start, prime (two-phase), heal, adopt, teardown-then-unfinalize, close(proof), quarantine, or nothing. A thin Executor applies actions idempotently under per-key exclusivity; failure requeues the key with jittered backoff; a periodic resync re-enqueues every key so no missed edge is permanent. Both reconciliation directions are rows of the same diff: runtime-without-bead → adopt; bead-no-longer-desired → set Deleted, run finalizers, close with a death certificate. Everything else in today's 14,400 LOC is accidental.
thesis: One pipeline, one field owner, guaranteed teardown: a single Observe→Plan→Materialize loop per session key, with Kubernetes SSA field ownership, finalizer-gated closure, a spec/status split, and rate-limited jittered requeue — mapped into Go types that make the write-side bug classes uncompilable.
oneParagraphPitch: Replace the six drifting reconcile engines with one keyed pipeline: Observe builds a typed Observation (SessionSpec + SessionStatus decoded from the bead, plus one tri-state runtime probe); a pure total Plan turns it into an ordered idempotent action list; an Executor materializes actions under per-key exclusivity. The write side is where the bugs live, so it gets Kubernetes discipline mapped to Go types: every metadata key belongs to exactly one field group with exactly one whole-value applier (SSA-lite), so partial stamping is impossible; closure is finalizer-gated so a bead cannot close while its pane lives; destructive actions embed a DeathCertificate constructible only from an observed-dead probe. A rate-limited, jittered, per-key requeue with a resync floor replaces the serial 30s mega-tick — dissolving both the god function and the respawn storm structurally.
keyInsight: The bug corpus is write-side, not decide-side. S19's pure core fixes deciding, but any of the ~250 raw metadata write sites can still betray it. Giving every field group exactly one whole-value writer, and making destructive operations demand proof objects (DeathCertificate, CloseProof), protects the system even while legacy paths still run — purity protects only code you have already rewritten; ownership protects the code you haven't.
testabilityStory: Plan is pure, total, clock-free: table tests enumerate (spec × status × runtime-tristate) rows — one per historical bug; totality is fuzz-checked (no panic, no skip); idempotence is one law — Observe∘Execute∘Plan yields ∅. No-destructive-without-proof is a compile-time guarantee, re-asserted by fuzzing Unobserved/Unknown runtimes and asserting zero close/kill actions. A simworld tier (memstore + fake provider + fake clock + seeded fault decorator injecting crash-between-writes) runs millions of seeded histories, asserting safety invariants every step and liveness after quiescence, replayable from seed+SHA — promoting the existing chaos test to a VOPR. The queue is tested on a fake clock: backoff schedule, dedup, jitter spread. Migration runs a differential oracle: legacy god function vs Plan on identical worlds, action streams compared via the trace vocabulary. Every production (Observation, Actions) log line is a replayable regression fixture.
whatGetsDeleted: The 5-overload chain and 2,188-line god function; most of build_desired_state.go's stamping; ApplyPatch's 72-arm fold, MarkClosed, ~75 *Info sibling predicates and the 52-pair equivalence tests; sweepUndesiredPoolSessionBeads plus the adoption-barrier and proc-table sweeps as separate engines; knownSessionStates skip-forever; the reloadActiveTTL band-aid; prevPoolRunning; the five tracker singletons. The 5,124-LOC trace WAL (segments/CRC/quarantine/arms) is deleted: the pure core's (Observation, Actions, Outcome) JSONL becomes the trace, and gc trace becomes a projection over it. Net: roughly half the 20,490-LOC cluster.
migrationPath: A: land SessionSpec/SessionStatus codecs and appliers over existing key names (logical grouping, no renames); route the 21 *Patch constructors through them — behavior-identical, guarded by the existing equivalence oracles. B: add Observe (one probe per key) feeding the legacy pass; shadow-run Plan and diff its action stream against WAL trace decisions; soak to zero divergence (the parity pin). C: flip action families one at a time behind pins — identity+priming first (S19 cores already merged, just unwired), then drain/drift, then close/rollback — deleting each legacy arm as it flips. D: restructure the tick as enqueue-all + serial drain, then enable per-key rate limits + jitter, then a small worker pool with per-key exclusivity. E: stamp finalizers on every spec apply, backfill once, enforce proof-gated close. F: retarget gc trace to the (Observation, Actions) log; delete the WAL machinery.
invariantFit: ZERO-roles: Plan and spec are role-blind, derived from config. Judgment-out-of-Go: Plan routes state mechanically; backoff/quarantine are transport intensity with config thresholds; quarantine emits an event so prompts/humans decide recovery. Beads-substrate: spec, status, finalizers, intent markers, quarantined_until all live in bead metadata — flagged tension: durable quarantine deliberately breaks the in-memory crashTracker/OTP precedent (a crash-looper no longer regains budget on controller restart); queue backoff counters stay ephemeral because they affect only timing. Layering: the pipeline moves into internal/, cmd/gc becomes wiring; the Executor confines side effects to Layer 0. Self-sufficiency: controller-only. No-premature-abstraction: the reconcile kit ships with two real instantiations (session; convergence adopting Commit/CAS) — refining S35: share mechanics, never state machines.
risks: CAS needs a reliable rev on Dolt/sqlite; if unavailable, per-key exclusivity covers in-process writers but cross-process observers fall back to convergence-by-idempotence. Whole-group applies risk Dolt write amplification — appliers must diff before writing. Field ownership is enforced in-process only; legacy code and external bd writes can violate it mid-migration, so the reconciler must treat foreign writes as drift and heal loudly. Worker-pool concurrency is new surface; exclusivity bugs would be subtle. Parity-mapping Plan actions onto the 185-code trace taxonomy may be lossy, weakening the pin.
whyThisWins: S19 purifies deciding but leaves ~250 raw write sites able to betray it, and the bug corpus is dominated by write-side gaps. T4 constrains the writes themselves — one owner per group, proof-carrying destruction, finalizer-gated close — so error classes die even while legacy paths still run. The per-key queue dissolves the god function and the respawn storm structurally, and the design refines S35 rather than fighting it.
